\tzpentry{ID4305}{Potential Energy Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4305 introduces Potential Energy Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$U(d) \propto \mu^2 / d^4 \to \infty \text{ as } d \to 0$
\]
